summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 open PR candidates. No close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutations are recommended. One security-sensitive PR is routed to central security handling; the rest are kept open as independent or related work because the shard is not a dedupe cluster and the artifact does not show a boring duplicate/superseded closeout path.
